# Soft5 Tool250 Grep10 Contract

## Soft 5
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.05 with quality bias floor 0.03 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 250
tool result budgets default to 250 chars with 2-char previews for denser reclaim

## Grep 10
Grep head defaults to 10 lines for denser search results

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/grep/status/footer vitest
